description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:4.2.3 Docker image. Define a before_script that runs `npm config set spin false`, installs global packages `bower`, `ember-cli`, and `phantomjs-prebuilt` via `npm install -g`, then runs `npm install` and `bower install --allow-root`. Add an `ember` job (which runs in the default test stage) whose script executes `COVERAGE=true ember test --test-port 4200`. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
